data.detail: awaiting-directive atom 0: awaiting Oscar's directive for atom 0

data.task:
Create a single-owner design-spec document at packages/ui/src/renderer/styles/design-spec.md that captures the CoCoder dashboard's design language as the documented LOCAL-DEFAULT design spec (priority: Local Preferences). It must extract — not re-copy — the design system already encoded as the `--cb-*` CSS custom properties in packages/ui/src/renderer/styles/fusion.css and oz.css.

WHAT TO PRODUCE (one document, these sections):
1. Resolution rule (state it first, one short paragraph): any new or onboarded workspace that defines no CSS/design of its own inherits this default design spec; a workspace-specified design wins. Note this spec is the single owner — the `--cb-*` custom properties in fusion.css/oz.css remain the runtime source of truth; this doc catalogs them, it does not fork them.
2. Color & surface tokens — enumerate the `--cb-*` color/accent/background/border/state tokens with their actual values and a one-line role for each (e.g. --cb-accent, the accent ramp --cb-accent-15..30, --cb-bg/--cb-bg-soft, --cb-border/--cb-border-strong, --cb-hover/--cb-active, --cb-error, glass/ambient/highlight tokens).
3. Typography — the --cb-font-display / --cb-font-body / --cb-font-mono families and any type-scale/weight conventions visible in the CSS.
4. Spacing & radius scale — the --cb-space-* and --cb-radius-* ramps with their values.
5. Motion — the --cb-duration-* and --cb-ease-* tokens with values.
6. Core component patterns — briefly, the recurring patterns the CSS encodes (e.g. glass/blur surfaces, gold-line accents, pill/radius usage, hover/active treatment) by reference to the rules that implement them. Keep this descriptive, not a paste of the rules.

HARD CONSTRAINTS:
- Values must match what is actually in fusion.css/oz.css today. Read both files; do not invent tokens or values. If a token's value is defined once, cite it once.
- Do NOT modify, reformat, or restyle ANY .css file or any other file. This atom creates exactly one new file: packages/ui/src/renderer/styles/design-spec.md. No other writes.
- Do NOT duplicate whole stylesheets into the doc. Extract tokens/patterns; reference the CSS as source of truth (one owner, no second hand-copy).

ACCEPTANCE / EXIT CRITERION (judgment-gated): the new design-spec.md exists; every token it lists matches fusion.css/oz.css exactly; all five token categories (color, type, spacing/radius, motion, components) and the resolution rule are present; no .css or other file changed (git diff shows exactly one added file). `pnpm typecheck` remains green (this adds no code). MUST NOT break: any CSS, the renderer build, or any other package. Report: the exact file added, the token counts per category, and the typecheck command + output.
